steps.name: Given user login to the application with 'default' credential
Given user navigate to the 'Temps' tab
Given user creates a temp with following details
Given user navigate to the 'Clients' tab
Given user creates a client with following details
Given user navigate to the 'Orders' tab
Given user creates a order with following details
